examples: The ultramafic intrusive complex is composed of dunite, peridotite, pyroxenite, gabbro and their metamorphic products.
This paper deals with the geological characteristics of a dunite body with layering structure from Sichuan-Yunnan area.
The Ophiolite massifs are composed of mantle peridotite that is mainly harzburgite and dunite, and lacked of crust magmatite within the typical Ophiolite suite.
